parsed_review.summary: CP00-858 is a descriptor-only RP28 Marketplace UI-fixture + golden-case coverage extension (Risk C, 150 units, RP28.P04.M06.S05-RP28.P05.M03.S08). Read-only static inspection (Read/Grep/Glob; no Bash) supports the pack's descriptor-only closeout claim. Implementation (model.js, states.js, registry.js) produces deeply-frozen, descriptor-only structures where every row asserts runtime_execution=false, writes_product_state=false, and no real-data/secret/permission/audit payloads. validators.js enforces these per-row plus the authority boundary (claude_is_final_approval=false, human_final_approval_required_for_runtime_opening=true, local_validation_claims_enterprise_trust=false), no runtime opening, no writes, Hermes packet emits_runtime_receipt=false, Claude packet read_only=true, closeout handoff, model registry, and contract-projection pack identity; the contract validator is fail-closed. The contract JSON validates (valid=true, latest_pack=CP00-858, latest_projection=MarketplaceCp858UiFixtureGoldenCaseDescriptor) with an all-closed no_write_attestation, and model.test.js covers CP858 binding/coverage/runtime-closed descriptor/projection. Manifest (production_ready=false, runtime_ready=false, descriptor layer), construction-inspection, adjudication, and claude-review-result correctly report the PENDING_REVIEW state without overclaiming. Authority boundary holds: Claude is a read-only reviewer not final approver; Hermes is control-plane review-evidence only (no product runtime embedded); enterprise-trust/runtime opening remain closed pending human approval. CP178+ hardening is intact: the 0-byte placeholder receipt is correctly NOT treated as a valid review (valid_review_receipts=[], exactly_one_valid_pack_level_claude_review_run=false) and the auth preflight passed with valid JSON. No real-client-data or secret/credential/token leakage was found in the contract or sources. No P0/P1 issues. Two non-blocking P3 notes are recorded. Provenance: this verdict is from static read-only inspection and the recorded initial command exits; the full validation suite is a post-review closeout-pipeline step that was not executed within this review.

findings.title: changed-file-scope dual-classifies new-session-handoff.md
findings.details: docs/closeout-pack-plan/new-session-handoff.md is listed in both untracked_implementation_files (line 155) and unrelated_dirty_files_preserved (line 162). It is not in active_pack_required_untracked_files (only docs/closeout-packs/cp00-858 is), and active_untracked_implementation_files_omitted is empty, so no active pack implementation file is omitted from review. The overlap is a metadata labeling inconsistency in the scope record, not a scope leak, and the file is a non-CP planning/handoff doc unrelated to this pack's marketplace deliverables.
findings.recommendation: Classify the handoff doc under a single category (unrelated preserved) in the scope record to avoid ambiguity; no change to pack deliverables is needed.
findings.post_review_disposition: Non-blocking metadata note. Key invariant (active_untracked_implementation_files_omitted empty) holds; does not block CP00-858 closeout.

findings.title: Full validation suite not executed within read-only review (provenance caveat)
findings.details: command-evidence records only the initial commands rp28:marketplace:validate (exit 0) and node --test packages/marketplace/test/*.test.js (exit 0), and explicitly notes the full validation suite is required after review/adjudication/queue regeneration. The 10 expected closeout commands (closeout-pack-plan:validate, closeout-pack:validate, npm test, validate, spec:requirements:validate, weighted:validate, fullplan:validate, goal:closeout:validate, rp00:control-plane:validate, git diff --check) are not yet recorded as run. As a read-only reviewer (no Bash) I verified descriptor/contract/test/boundary consistency by static inspection and the recorded exits only; I did not re-execute these commands.
findings.recommendation: Closeout pipeline must run and record passing results for the full validation suite (and git diff --check, accounting for the unrelated progress-control-room dirty files) before promoting the marketplace_ui_fixture_golden_case_descriptor_verified flag to true.
findings.post_review_disposition: Expected by design (review precedes full-suite run); not a defect. Promotion remains gated on the recorded full-suite pass, which is outside this read-only receipt.
